traces.name: synthetic-lte-handover
traces.description: synthetic LTE-ish uplink: ~12 Mbps with a 200ms capacity dip every 2s (handover), 10s, looped
traces.cite: Generated by impair from published cellular-link model parameters (Winstein et al., Mahimahi, USENIX ATC 2015) — delivery-opportunity format adopted verbatim; no third-party trace data redistributed
traces.notes: Mahimahi delivery-opportunity format: one ms timestamp per line, each grants one MTU of egress. Regenerate the digest with profile.HashBytes after editing.
